title: Traffic Light Control R09
short description: AFSK Modulated signal with 2400Baud for traffic light control. Contains R09.16 telegrams as specified per [https://knowhow.vdv.de/documents/420/ VDV Standard 420].
description:
AFSK Modulated signal with 2400Baud for traffic light control. Contains R09.16 telegrams as specified per [VDV Standard 420](https://knowhow.vdv.de/documents/420/).
One Half Wave of a 1200Hz tone is a 1.
One Full Wave of a 2400Hz tone is a 0.

The sample was received at 170.81 MHz.
